article_meta.title: Christmas travelers left stranded as airports see mass flight cancelations

reasoning: Mixed performance: correctly flagged clear sensational author prose but committed an attribution violation by flagging FlightAware's branded term and missed multiple other loaded phrases in the author's voice.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged "Misery Map," which is clearly attributed to FlightAware (quoted branded feature), violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: One clear false positive ("Misery Map") and one debatable item ("mass flight cancelations").
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple salient biased phrasings in author prose such as "left stranded," repeated "travel chaos," "brunt," and "disastrous rain storm."
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For correctly identified items, labels were appropriate: "ho-ho-horrible position" as Sensationalism/Emotionalism and "mass" as Subjective Qualifying Adjective are defensible.
